notes.connections:
Keithley 0  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "+12V" → 12.0 V, 0.5 A limit
    CH2 "+3.8V" → 3.8 V, 0.5 A limit
    CH3 "CH3" → 0.0 V, 0.0 A limit
Hittite 0 REFIN  (Signal Generator) → REF_CLK
	EVAL-ADF4030 P14→ InterPoser P51 
FieldFox 0 BSYNC  (Spectrum Analyzer) ← Interposer J31
Hittite 1 UNUSED → Interposer J32
Keithley 1  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "Beam" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH2 "CH2" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH3 "CH3" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
Keysight EL 0  (Electronic Load)
    CH1 – CC mode, 0.1, input OFF
    CH2 – CR mode, 10000, input ON
notes.sources:
Keithley 0 – +3.8V @ 3.8 V-Alt to 12V wall plugin
Hittite 0 REF_CLK – 122.88 MHz, 4 dBm
FieldFox 0 BSYNC – Spectrum analyzer, center 122.88 MHz, span 200 MHz
Keithley 1 – DUT power supply (channels unused or 0 V)
Keysight EL 0 – Electronic load
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
FieldFox 0 BSYNC – Record output spectrum
Keithley 1 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
Keysight EL 0 – Monitor load currents / voltages
notes.general:
Config: ADF4030
Power-up sequence (order matters):
    KeithleyChannel: Keithley 0 Channel 1
    Delay: 1.0 s
    Instrument: Hittite 0 REF_CLK

On S1:
	REF_CLK: ON
	REFIN: OFF
